# terrible_community_general_dnf_config_manager (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `name` (String) Repository ID, for example `crb`.
- `state` (String) Whether the repositories should be `enabled` or `disabled`.

### Read-Only

- `changed_repos` (String) Repositories changed.
- `repo_states_post` (String) Repository states after action taken.
- `repo_states_pre` (String) Repo IDs before action taken.
